hero.title: LAUNCH YOUR
hero.description: Exclusive pathways to the world's top hospitality schools. Experience Swiss precision, French technique, and global opportunity.

homePrograms.title: DISCOVER YOUR
homePrograms.description: A comprehensive curriculum designed for future industry leaders. Immerse yourself in excellence with our specialized degrees.

successStory.title: FROM THE CLASSROOM TO
successStory.quote: "I WENT FROM A HOME COOK TO A MICHELIN KITCHEN IN 18 MONTHS."
successStory.description: Start your own success story today. Our admissions team is ready to guide your first steps toward a global culinary career.

testimonials.title: WORDS FROM OUR
testimonials.description: Join a community of passionate individuals who have transformed their culinary dreams into reality.
testimonials.quote1: "The personalized career coaching was invaluable. I landed my dream internship at the Four Seasons thanks to their direct connections."
testimonials.quote2: "Moving to Switzerland was daunting, but the visa assistance team made it seamless. I could focus entirely on my studies from day one."
testimonials.quote3: "The facilities are world-class. Learning molecular gastronomy with state-of-the-art equipment gave me a huge advantage in the job market."

hero.title: FIND YOUR PERFECT
hero.description: Browse our curated selection of world-class programs from top culinary institutes across Switzerland, France, and beyond.

whyStudy.title: GLOBAL EXPOSURE FOR A
whyStudy.description: Culinary arts is a universal language. Studying abroad not only enhances your technical skills but immerses you in the cultural context of the cuisine you are mastering.
whyStudy.stat: International students secure placement before graduation

cultural.title: Cross-Cultural Competence
cultural.description: Gain adaptability and cultural sensitivity highly valued in multinational hospitality groups.

network.title: Global Network
network.description: Build connections with peers, chefs, and industry leaders from over 50 different countries.

internships.title: Prestigious Internships
internships.description: Access exclusive internship opportunities in Michelin-starred restaurants and 5-star hotels globally.

cta.title: NOT SURE WHICH PROGRAM FITS YOU?
cta.description: Use our smart comparison tool to evaluate curriculum, costs, and career outcomes side-by-side.

hero.title: Culinary Insights Blog
hero.subtitle: Expert perspective on the future of international gastronomy.

newsletter.title: Start your culinary journey today
newsletter.description: Get exclusive scholarship alerts, study abroad guides, and industry news delivered directly to your inbox weekly.

courseProgression.title: COURSE PROGRESSION
courseProgression.subtitle: Our unique "Study & Work" system allows you to gain 1.5 years of work experience during your 3-year bachelor degree.

learningObjectives.title: Key Learning Objectives
learningObjectives.description: Our program goes beyond recipes. We cultivate the discipline, creativity, and business acumen required to lead modern kitchens. Students master classical French techniques while embracing contemporary global trends in sustainability and farm-to-table concepts.

careerOpportunities.title: Career Opportunities
careerOpportunities.description: Graduates of our Bachelor in Culinary Arts are highly sought after by luxury hotels, fine dining restaurants, and catering companies worldwide. The integrated internships provide a significant advantage in the job market, often leading to direct employment offers upon graduation.

entryRequirements.subtitle: Standard criteria for admission into the Bachelor program.

hero.title: OUR MISSION:
hero.description: For over a decade, we have bridged the gap between ambitious culinary talents and the world's most prestigious kitchens. We believe in precision, passion, and the transformative power of education.

timeline.title: A LEGACY OF
timeline.description: From a small consultancy in Zurich to a global network spanning 3 continents, our journey mirrors the careers of the chefs we mentor: built on discipline, creativity, and an unwavering commitment to quality.

event1.title: The Foundation
event1.description: Founded in Zurich by Chef Marco Pierre and educational consultant Sarah Jenkins, with a vision to provide honest, expert guidance to students aspiring to study in Switzerland.

event2.title: Asian Expansion
event2.description: Opened our first regional office in Singapore to support the growing demand from Southeast Asia, partnering with top hospitality groups like Raffles and Marina Bay Sands for internships.

event3.title: Michelin Partnerships
event3.description: Formalized exclusive internship agreements with 15 Michelin-starred restaurants across France and Switzerland, ensuring our students train with the absolute best.

event4.title: Digital Innovation
event4.description: Launched our virtual mentorship platform, connecting students with alumni chefs worldwide for real-time career advice and masterclasses.

team.title: MEET THE
team.description: Guided by veterans of the industry who have walked the path you aspire to take.

member1.name: Chef Marco Pierre
member1.description: Former Executive Chef at The Dorchester with 25 years of experience in fine dining. Marco oversees curriculum alignment and industry relations.

member2.name: Sarah Jenkins
member2.description: An education strategist who has placed over 1,000 students in top hospitality schools. Sarah specializes in career pathing and scholarship negotiation.

member3.name: Jean-Luc Dubois
member3.description: Award-winning chocolatier and former Head of Pastry at Ritz Paris. Jean-Luc guides students interested in the specialized world of patisserie.

values.title: VISION &
values.description: The principles that drive our consultancy and the success of our students.

value1.title: Uncompromising Quality
value1.description: We only partner with accredited institutions that meet the highest international standards. We believe that a strong foundation is non-negotiable for a lasting career.

value2.title: Global Perspective
value2.description: Culinary arts is a universal language. We encourage our students to explore diverse cultures, techniques, and cuisines to become truly global citizens of the kitchen.

value3.title: Student-Centricity
value3.description: Every student's journey is unique. We provide personalized mentorship that goes beyond admission, focusing on long-term career fulfillment and personal growth.

global.title: GLOBAL REACH,
global.description: Our network connects you to the culinary capitals of the world. From the classic kitchens of Paris to the innovative food scenes of Tokyo.
